headline: Procter & Gamble (PG) Stock May Be 21% Undervalued Following Its 70th Dividend Increase
summary: Procter & Gamble stock has delivered a 22.5% total return over the past five years, yet the valuation picture today is mixed, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate pointing to meaningful upside while market multiples look closer to fair. A 22.5% five year return suggests Procter & Gamble has offered steady, though not spectacular, shareholder gains over a longer holding period. Consistent dividend growth and ongoing brand investment can support the cash flows behind...
